backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no state or methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a typography brightness update affecting frontend/src/index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of numerous frontend source files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH theme tokens for light and dark modes, applying global background and text colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entrypoint loading fonts, mounting the root element, and importing the main React module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app managing authentication, view transitions, background selection, and planner store integration.
frontend/src/components/animations/ViewT: Simple wrapper that applies enter animations based on view key and transition direction.
frontend/src/components/background/Backg: Background image wrapper with overlay gradients, image preloading, and fallback logic on load errors.
frontend/src/features/auth/LoginScreen.t: Login screen using Internet Identity with informational sections, glass styling, and background image support.
frontend/src/features/background/monthBa: Map of months to background images with helpers for resolving month-based and fallback URLs.
frontend/src/features/planner/DailyPlanV: Renders a daily task view with morning/afternoon/evening sections, allowing adding, editing, and deleting tasks.
Provides date utilities for month grid generation, formatting dates, and retrieving month names.
frontend/src/features/planner/MonthlyCal: Displays a navigable monthly calendar grid and triggers date selection with visual transitions.
frontend/src/features/planner/storage.ts: Handles loading, saving, validating, importing, and exporting planner data in localStorage.
frontend/src/features/planner/TaskItem.t: Shows an individual task with inline editing and delete animations.
frontend/src/features/planner/types.ts: Defines TypeScript types for tasks, day plans, and planner data structures.
frontend/src/features/planner/usePlanner: Implements a React hook managing planner state with add, update, delete, replace, and clear operations synced to storage.
frontend/src/features/profile/ProfileVie: React settings page showing identity info and allowing theme/motion changes plus import/export and clearing of planner data.
frontend/src/features/settings/preferenc: Manages theme and motion preferences using localStorage and applies them to the document root.
frontend/src/features/settings/usePrefer: React hook that exposes theme and motion preference state and updates, syncing with storage and system settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, loading identities, handling login/logout, and exposing authentication state.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining global color tokens, dark mode values, fonts, and UI animations for transitions and calendars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point configuring React Query and Internet Identity provider before rendering the application.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme tokens, colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project state, features, requests, and versioning for build planning.
